changeSet.author: mironov.rs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE performance_evaluation ( evaluation_id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, evaluation_date DATE NOT NULL, kpi VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, score INT NOT NULL, comment TEXT, employee_id BIGINT NOT NULL, reviewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_evaluation_employee FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee(employee_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT FK_evaluation_reviewer FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES employee(employee_id) );
